# Cowork AI OS Install State - Template
# This file is the SEED. The orchestrator reads this on first run, then
# writes the actual user-specific state to user_workspace/_aibos/state.md.
# DO NOT edit this file in the plugin folder.

plugin_version: 0.5.0
started: null
last_session: null
next_phase: 1
install_complete: false

# Set in Phase 2 — either 'interview' or 'sample-first'.
# Phases 3 and 4 read this so they don't ask again.
interview_path: null

phases:
  1: { name: handbook,           status: pending }
  2: { name: about-me,           status: pending }
  3: { name: business-brain,     status: pending }
  4: { name: writing-rules,      status: pending }
  5: { name: connectors,         status: pending }
  6: { name: folders,            status: pending }
  7: { name: skills-tour,        status: pending }
  8: { name: cadence,            status: pending }
  9: { name: verify,             status: pending }
